  • Uses of Semisequent in de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.executor

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.executor with parameters of type Semisequent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    InfFlowContractAppTacletExecutor.addToAntec(Semisequent semi, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, PosInOccurrence pos, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull Goal goal, @NonNull TacletApp tacletApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    adds SequentFormula to antecedent depending on position information (if none is handed over it is added at the head of the antecedent).

  • Uses of Semisequent in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util with parameters of type Semisequent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PosInOccurrence
    SymbolicExecutionUtil.findModalityWithMaxSymbolicExecutionLabelId(Semisequent semisequent, boolean inAntec)
    Searches the modality JTerm with the maximal SymbolicExecutionTermLabel ID SymbolicExecutionTermLabel.id() in the given Semisequent.
    static PosInOccurrence
    SymbolicExecutionUtil.findModalityWithMinSymbolicExecutionLabelId(Semisequent semisequent, boolean inAntec)
    Searches the modality PosInOccurrence with the minimal SymbolicExecutionTermLabel ID SymbolicExecutionTermLabel.id() in the given Semisequent.
    static ImmutableList<JTerm>
    SymbolicExecutionUtil.listSemisequentTerms(Semisequent semisequent)
    Lists the JTerms contained in the given Semisequent.

  • Uses of Semisequent in org.key_project.prover.rules

    Methods in org.key_project.prover.rules with parameters of type Semisequent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    TacletExecutor.addToAntec(Semisequent semi, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, PosInOccurrence pos, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, MatchResultInfo matchCond, Goal goal, App tacletApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    adds SequentFormula to antecedent depending on position information (if none is handed over it is added at the head of the antecedent).
    protected void
    TacletExecutor.addToPos(Semisequent semi, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, PosInOccurrence pos, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, boolean antec, MatchResultInfo matchCond, Goal goal, App tacletApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    instantiates the formulas of semisequent semi and adds the instantiated formulas at the specified position to goal
    protected void
    TacletExecutor.addToSucc(Semisequent semi, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, PosInOccurrence pos, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, MatchResultInfo matchCond, Goal goal, App ruleApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    adds SequentFormula to succedent depending on position information (if none is handed over it is added at the head of the succedent).
    protected ImmutableList<SequentFormula>
    TacletExecutor.instantiateSemisequent(Semisequent semi, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, MatchResultInfo matchCond, Goal goal, App tacletApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    instantiates the given semisequent with the instantiations found in the match results
    protected void
    TacletExecutor.replaceAtPos(Semisequent semi, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, PosInOccurrence pos, MatchResultInfo matchCond, Goal goal, App ruleApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
    Replaces the formula at the given position with the first formula in the given semisequent and adds possible other formulas of the semisequent starting at the position.

    Methods in org.key_project.prover.sequent that return Semisequent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Semisequent
    Sequent.antecedent()
    Retrieves the semisequent representing the antecedent of this sequent.
    protected abstract Semisequent
    Sequent.createSemisequent(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> formulas)
    Creates a new Semisequent composed of the list of formulas proved as argument
    protected abstract Semisequent
    SequentKit.createSemisequent(ImmutableList<SequentFormula> ante)
     
    abstract Semisequent
    SequentKit.getEmptySemisequent()
    Returns a semisequent with no formulas.
    Semisequent
    Sequent.succedent()
    Retrieves the semisequent representing the succedent of this sequent.
    Methods in org.key_project.prover.sequent with parameters of type Semisequent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Sequent
    Sequent.composeSequent(boolean inAntecedent, Semisequent otherSemisequent)
    Replaces the antecedent or succedent of this sequent with a specified Semisequent.
    protected abstract Sequent
    Sequent.createSequent(Semisequent newAntecedent, Semisequent newSuccedent)
    Creates a new sequent of the shape newAntecedent ==> newSuccedent.
    protected abstract Sequent
    SequentKit.createSequent(Semisequent antecedent, Semisequent succedent)
    creates a new Sequent
    protected Sequent
    SequentKit.newAntecedent(Semisequent antecedent)
    creates a new Sequent with empty succedent
    protected Sequent
    SequentKit.newSequent(Semisequent antecedent, Semisequent succedent)
    creates a new Sequent
    protected Sequent
    SequentKit.newSuccedent(Semisequent succedent)
    creates a new Sequent with empty antecedent

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    NILSequent(Semisequent emptySemisequent)
     
    protected
    Sequent(Semisequent emptySeq)
    Constructs a new empty Sequent object, used for Sequent.NILSequent implementations.

    Sequent(Semisequent antecedent, Semisequent succedent)
    Constructs a new Sequent object with the specified antecedent and succedent.
